zh.Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比
zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustachia De Basset於大約1176年出生在英國奧可福爾比斯特時，她的父親Gilbert Basset23歲，母親Egelina de Courtenay22歲。她於大約1198年與Thomas de Verdun of Hethe在英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾結婚。她去世於大約1215年在英國林可爾史爾布拉特萊比享年41歲。

zh-hans.Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾布拉特萊比
zh-hans.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustachia De Basset于大约1176年出生在英国奧可福爾比斯特时，她的父亲Gilbert Basset23岁，母亲Egelina de Courtenay22岁。她于大约1198年与Thomas de Verdun of Hethe在英国斯塔福爾黑阿德爾结婚。她去世于大约1215年在英国林可爾史爾布拉特萊比享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Eustachia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustachia De Basset was born about 1176, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Gilbert Basset, was 23 and her mother, Egelina de Courtenay, was 22. She married Thomas de Verdun of Hethe about 1198, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England. She died about 1215, in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustachia De Basset est née environ 1176, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Basset, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Egelina de Courtenay, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Verdun of Hethe environ 1198, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée environ 1215, à Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustachia De Basset um 1176 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert Basset 23 und ihre Mutter Egelina de Courtenay 22. Sie hat um 1198 in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England Thomas de Verdun of Hethe geheiratet. Sie starb um 1215 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachia De Basset è nata il circa 1176 nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Gilbert Basset, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Egelina de Courtenay, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Verdun of Hethe circa 1198, nel Cheadle, Staffordshire, England. Morì circa 1215, nel Brattleby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Bassetが約1176年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターで生まれた時，父Gilbert Bassetは23歳，母Egelina de Courtenayは22歳であった。約1198年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェアドルでThomas de Verdun of Hetheと結婚した。彼女は約1215年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブラットレビーで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Basset(이)가 대략 1176년 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Basset(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egelina de Courtenay(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1198년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 Thomas de Verdun of Hethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 링코실르 브래틀레비에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1176–Abt 1215: tany ho any amin'ny 1176–tany ho any amin'ny 1215

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachia De Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1176, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Basset, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Egelina de Courtenay, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Verdun of Hethe aproximadamente 1198, em Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1215, em Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustachia De Basset родилась около 1176 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert Basset было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Egelina de Courtenay, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Verdun of Hethe около 1198 г. в местности чидл, стаффордшир, Англия. Она умерла около 1215 г. в местности браттлеби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

sm.Abt 1176–Abt 1215: e tusa o le 1176–e tusa o le 1215

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustachia De Basset nació aproximadamente 1176, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert Basset, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Egelina de Courtenay, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas de Verdun of Hethe aproximadamente 1198, en Cheadle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1215, en Brattleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
